steps.title: Identify the two functions shown
steps.content:
The graph displays two functions:
  • A V-shaped absolute value function with vertex at $(4, 2)$
  • A straight line passing through $(0, 4)$ with slope $1$, so $y = x + 4$

steps.title: Read the intersection point from the grid
steps.content: The straight line meets the left branch of the absolute value function at the point where $x = 1$ and $y = 5$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
